title: Say One for Me
actors: Debbie Reynolds, Bing Crosby, Robert Wagner
plot: Father Conroy (Crosby) has a parish which serves the acting and performance community. When one of his parishoners gets too sick to work, his daughter Holly (Reynolds) finds a job working for a dance club of questionable character...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 5 nominations total
